subgoal: Tap the Subject field and enter a meeting subject
acceptance_criteria: Success if the compose email screen remains open and the Subject field is focused/active with the subject value set to the provided text (or visibly present within the subject input). Minor UI changes like cursor/keyboard appearing are acceptable; no navigation away from the compose form should occur.

llm_result.reason: The UI remains on the compose email screen and the Subject field content changed from the placeholder 'Subject' to the entered text 'Meeting on 2026-03-18 14:00', indicating the subject was set (and likely focused during entry). No navigation away from the compose form is shown.

notable_changes: Subject placeholder replaced by entered subject text: 'Meeting on 2026-03-18 14:00'

suspicious_signals: Focus/keyboard state not explicitly visible in widget list, but subject text presence strongly indicates successful entry

final.reason: The UI remains on the compose email screen and the Subject field content changed from the placeholder 'Subject' to the entered text 'Meeting on 2026-03-18 14:00', indicating the subject was set (and likely focused during entry). No navigation away from the compose form is shown.
